personalInfo.name: Ayoub jalyta
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.shortBio: I'm a full stack developer with a passion for crafting beautiful and functional web experiences.

paragraphs: Hello! I'm a passionate Senior Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in creating dynamic, responsive, and user-friendly web applications using React and TypeScript. My specialization lies in integrating powerful AI services like the Gemini API to build intelligent and interactive user experiences.

With a strong eye for UI/UX design and a commitment to writing clean, maintainable code, I strive to bridge the gap between complex technology and beautiful, intuitive interfaces. I am constantly exploring new technologies to push the boundaries of what's possible on the web.

projects.title: Project Nebula
projects.description: A conceptual design for a futuristic music streaming service.

projects.title: Cyber Dashboard
projects.description: An analytics dashboard with a dark, cyberpunk-inspired theme.

projects.title: Data Visualization Dashboard
projects.description: A dynamic dashboard for visualizing complex datasets using D3.js and Recharts, with interactive charts and graphs.

projects.title: Serverless Task Manager
projects.description: A task management app built on a serverless architecture, featuring user authentication and real-time updates.
